text.title: LinkedIn Founder Post Template Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real deployments of LinkedIn Founder Post Template. Each pairs symptom + sourced root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Post reads 'In today's fast-paced world, AI is changing everything'; engagement < 5 likes.
antipattern.root-cause: lived-evidence rule violated; post indistinguishable from GPT default.
antipattern.fix: Replace generic prose with one specific event (customer X, week Y, metric Z).

antipattern.symptom: Post body contains landing-page URL; reach drops 40% vs. comparable posts.
antipattern.root-cause: no-link-in-body rule violated; algorithm penalty applied.
antipattern.fix: Move URL to first comment; edit body to remove the link.

antipattern.symptom: Post asks reader to 'DM me, subscribe, share, AND comment'; zero actions taken.
antipattern.fix: Cut to one CTA — pick the highest-leverage one (usually book or subscribe).
